AdditionalAttributes.description:
MAXHUB 105'' Non Touch Panel

Ship out the order within 24-48 hours.

Estimated Delivery Time Frame: 2 - 15 business days

Change of mind:
Customer can return the item if purchased by mistake within 14 days of the customer’s order being received.

Change of mind returns will only be eligible for a refund on the product’s sale price within receiving the item'. Return postage is paid by the customer.

Warranty

Without prejudice and to the extent allowed by the Trade Practices Act 1974, The Australian Consumer Law and Competition and Consumer Act 2010, all hardware sold by MAD Electronics Australia is covered by one year limited warranty and is also backed by Australian manufacturer warranty. Where the manufacturer warranty period exceeds one year, we will advise the customer to contact the manufacturer directly for warranty support after the first year of purchase. Due to the nature of consumables products and software, they are not returnable or refundable items.

Any defective products purchased from MAD Electronics Australia and affiliates that fall within the warranty period provided will be covered, unless they fall within the following conditions:

· Physical Damage on the product not caused in the event during transit or Dead on Arrival (DOA) but caused due to mishandling, incorrect use of product for its purposes, improper installation of product, by accident, insect or vermin infestation, improper method or failure to maintain service and handle the item with reasonable care.

· The product has been modified using unauthorised methods. Any modifications on the product including physical and software modifications using third party unauthorised software such as third party firmware updates will void the warranty of products.
· The warranty seal or serial number of the item has been tampered with.
· The item has been serviced by another party other than madelectronics
· Consequential loss including but not limited to data, programs, software or other information stored on storage products, computer or laptop systems.
· Software

Our goods come with guarantees that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law. You are entitled to a replacement or refund for a major failure and compensation for any other reasonably foreseeable loss or damage. You are also entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced if the goods fail to be of acceptable quality and the failure does not amount to a major failure.



Visit this page for more information on how to stay safe online.

Products.Name: TCL 75" C8L SQD 4K QLED UHD Mini LED Smart Google TV 75C8L
Products.DisplayName: TCL 75" C8L SQD 4K QLED UHD Mini LED Smart Google TV 75C8L
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'TCL 75" C8L SQD 4K QLED UHD Mini LED Smart Google TV 75C8L' has a supply limit of 2. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Experience premium home entertainment with the TCL C8L Series 4K UHD SQD-Mini LED Google TV, available in 65", 75", 85", and 98" screen sizes. Featuring TCL's advanced Deep Colour System with Super QLED technology, the C8L delivers stunning colour accuracy, exceptional contrast, and immersive brightness for a truly cinematic viewing experience.

Powered by the TCL Halo Control System and Full Array Local Dimming technology with up to 4,032 dimming zones, the C8L Series produces deeper blacks, brilliant highlights, and precise picture detail. Dolby Vision IQ, HDR10+, and peak brightness up to 6000 nits ensure outstanding clarity and lifelike visuals in every scene.

The WHVA 2.0 Ultra Panel provides wide viewing angles, anti-reflective performance, and vibrant picture quality from virtually any seat in the room. With a 4K UHD resolution (3840 x 2160), Quantum Dot Technology, and 144Hz Variable Refresh Rate support, the C8L Series is designed for smooth sports, fast-action gaming, and premium movie performance.

Running on Google TV, the TCL C8L offers easy access to popular streaming services including Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, Amazon Prime Video, Stan, Kayo, Apple TV+, Paramount+, and more. Built-in Google Assistant, hands-free voice control, Chromecast, Apple AirPlay, and Apple HomeKit compatibility provide smart and convenient entertainment control.

For gamers, the C8L Series includes HDMI 2.1 connectivity, Auto Low Latency Mode (ALLM), AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, and 4K 144Hz VRR support for ultra-responsive gameplay with reduced lag and smooth motion.

Premium Bang & Olufsen tuned audio with Dolby Atmos and DTS Virtual:X creates immersive surround sound, while the sleek border-free design delivers a modern and sophisticated look suitable for any living space.

Specification Sheet

  • Delivery is only from Door to Door. Please ensure access is practical and check dimensions against your entry points.
  • We only ship within Australia to physical addresses such as houses, apartments or businesses and DO NOT post internationally, to PO Boxes, Parcel Lockers, etc.

Warranty Policy

All products at are brand new and come with a minimum of 12 months Manufacturer's Warranty (unless otherwise specified). You must retain a copy of your tax invoice and contact the Manufacturer directly if you require warranty service and repairs. 

 

Returns Policy

We recommend that customers thoroughly inspect the goods when delivery takes place. If upon delivery you notice an item is damaged, not as described, or faulty, you are required to reject delivery by the driver, to which you will need to contact our Customer Service Team as soon as possible to arrange re-delivery.

As the customer, you have a duty of care for the product whilst it is in your possession. If products are damaged by you and subsequently returned, a charge will be made to repair the product to its original condition. Please be aware that where repair is not economically viable, no refund will be made.

We are unable to accept return of any goods that you have attempted to connect, install or have used.



Visit this page for more information on how to stay safe online.

WARNING: KEEP BATTERIES OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.
If you think batteries might have been swallowed or placed inside any part of the body, seek immediate medical attention. Call the 24-hour Poisions Information Centre on 131 126  (Australia) / 0800 764 766 (New Zealand)  for fast, expert advice. Dispose of used batteries immediately and safely. Flat batteries can still be dangerous. Store batteries in original packaging in a cool dry place.

We will do everything we can to ensure quick and secure delivery, but ultimately, we can not be held responsible for lost, stolen or damaged goods unless the item is insured. If problems do arise, please contact us, and we will do our utmost to resolve any issues.

We use AusPost, Fastway, StarTrack, TNT and other delivery services at our discretion. If no one is present at the delivery address, the courier may at their discretion elect to leave the parcel in a safe place at the premises, or they may instead opt to leave a calling card advising the nearest post office or depot where the item can be collected from. Tracking details of your parcel will be emailed to you once your order has been dispatched, and it is the buyer's responsibility to actively monitor their parcel delivery using the provided tracking details.

You are responsible for inspecting the product received from Elite Electronics upon arrival. Parcels that are damaged in transit must be reported to us via email, and accompanied by photographic evidence of the damage.

Missing or lost parcels must be reported as soon as possible.

For orders where tracking shows that attempted delivery was unsuccessful and the parcel is subsequently returned to sender, we will charge a re-delivery fee to re-deliver the order, or a restocking fee if the customer elects to cancel the order.

We can not authorise 'Authority to Leave' for high valued parcels.

 

Estimated delivery timeframe: Metro: 2-8 business days & Regional: 4-10 business days

The above delivery time frames are estimates only. The actual delivery time is dependent on the shipping location, shipper's processing capacity and other unforeseeable factors i.e. nature disasters, accidents etc. We cannot be held responsible for any courier-related delivery delays.

Return Policy

All sales are final unless items are found to be damaged or defective.

The buyer is responsible for the compatibility of the product.

We offer a 30-day 'Change of Mind' or 'Incorrect Purchase' return option on products that are unused, unopened and the tamper seal, if present, is not broken; otherwise, we reserve the right to reject these return requests as abided by Australian Consumer Law. A 15% restocking fee with a min charge of $10 and a max of $80 + a Handling fee at our discretion may apply if we elect to approve a Change of Mind/Incorrect Purchase return that meets the above criteria.

 

Warranty

To make a warranty claim against any product with manufacturing defects, you must first contact us to request a Return Authorisation (RA) form. Once approved, you must send the defective product with all original contents, accompanied by proof of purchase and the RA form to the provided address. Products returned without an RA number will be rejected.

We cover the shipping cost for all valid warranty returns where a product has been assessed and confirmed as being faulty. You must ensure that the items are carefully packed in suitable packaging for safe transport to prevent damage during transportation. Insufficient packaging will result in the warranty being voided should any damage occur in transit.

You will not incur any parts or labour costs associated with the repair. If the defective item cannot be repaired and a replacement is not available, a full refund will be issued to the account from where the payment was received. International customer refunds are subject to fluctuations in exchange rates, which we cannot govern nor compensate for.

 

This warranty does not cover:

  • Damage to products or parts caused by accident, misuse, neglect, abuse, improper installation, use, operation or failure to follow instructions contained in the manual for the operation and use of the product, water, fire, electricity surges, spikes or overloads, vermin or other animals.

  • Damage to products or parts caused by improper installation not in accordance with the installation instructions provided with the product or part.

  • Damage to products or parts resulting from repair or attempted repair by a person who is not an authorised repairer of Elite Electronics or the manufacturer of the products or parts.

  • Any products or parts where the serial number has been removed, modified or defaced.

  • Speakers and subwoofers with blown, burnt or blackened voice coils, or other damage resulting from electrical surges, spikes or overloads.

  • Products or parts tested by Elite Electronics that are found to be not faulty or the described fault cannot be reproduced. In this case, Elite Electronics reserves the right to charge an assessment fee as well as a return shipping fee before the product or part can be returned to you.

  • The replacement of parts necessary due to normal wear and tear.

  • The costs of removal and return of the products or parts to Elite Electronics or an authorised repairer/service centre including packaging and freight costs and the costs of re-installation of the product on return.

Our goods come with guarantees that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law. You are entitled to a replacement or refund for a major failure and compensation for any other reasonably foreseeable loss or damage. You are also entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced if goods fail to be of acceptable quality and the failure does not amount to a major failure.

Products.Name: NOTHING Phone (3) 5G 256GB (Black)
Products.DisplayName: NOTHING Phone (3) 5G 256GB (Black)
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'NOTHING Phone (3) 5G 256GB (Black)' has a supply limit of 10. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Key Features

A new smartphone experience
Phone (3) introduces a new, more personal way of interacting with your smartphone through the fully redesigned Glyph Interface. The Essential Engine powers a new OS experience that prioritises mindfulness and productivity.

Unique design language
With bold modular geometry and premium recycled materials, Phone (3) redefines personal style. Its tri-column design blends sustainability with sophistication, making it a true reflection of your individuality.

Built for creators
An all-50MP 4-sensor camera system, powered by TrueLens Engine 4, empowers users to capture every moment with lifelike details and professional-grade versatility.

Ultra XDR photo
Capture 13 RAW frames at varying exposures and merge them to reveal stunning detail. Each pixel's brightness is then boosted by up to 12 times on screen for a more lifelike image.

AI Semantic Segmentation
Experience real-time image segmentation at a pixel-level, powered by the latest Qualcomm ISP and AI engine, optimising every photo with enhanced colours and exposure.

Portrait Mode
AI subject segmentation identifies elements within a portrait, from clothing to skin and fine details like hair to create natural bokeh, accurate skin tones, and stunning photos.

GenAI Ultra Zoom
When zooming beyond 30X, AI steps in to recognize distant, blurred scenes and generates details to enhance clarity.

Life in 4K Ultra XDR
Every frame, every detail, captured in striking clarity at 4K 60fps, so when Phone (3)'s recording light shines, it's your cue to create.

Powerful and fast
Powered by the Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 chipset, Phone (3) delivers next-level speed, advanced AI capabilities, and exceptional efficiency-helping you do more, faster.

Purposefully mindful
Effortlessly intuitive and meaningfully customisable, Nothing OS brings you closer to a more mindful, powerful smartphone experience with a unique design DNA and curated, intelligent feature set.

More pixels
Stunningly sharp visuals with a resolution of 1260 x 2800, inky, vibrant AMOLED technology, with an impressive pixel density of 460 ppi. Enjoy Nothing's richest, most true-to-life visuals.

Long lasting, fast charging
Phone (3) features our most advanced and longest-lasting battery yet, charging from 1-50% in under 20 minutes. It is also compatible with 15W wireless charging and doubles as a 5W wireless charger, allowing you to power accessories like Nothing Ear on-the-go.

Sounds right
Phone (3) features a symmetrical speaker's structure. With speakers on both sides of the frame, enjoy un-muffled clarity however you hold it.

Metro- Up to 5 business days

Regional - Up to 10 business days

Warranty on the products will be the mentioned warranty period as provided by the manufacturer.

We do no accept change of mind returns

 

We guarantee to provide maximum satisfaction to our customers. If there is a manufacturing defect in the product, customer can send it to us for the assessment of the product. When the product is received and verified, we will repair and send it back to you. If the product is beyond repair we will provide you a replacement for the same.

Please make a valid selection while making your purchase. Once an order is submitted, a customer is committed to the purchase until and unless there is a valid reason to cancel.

As per the statement provided under the Australian Consumer Law, a consumer is entitled to a refund only if there is a major reason not when a customer changes his mind or has picked the wrong product due to some reason. 



Visit this page for more information on how to stay safe online.

Products.Name: Kodak Charmera Keychain Digital Camera (Blind Box)
Products.DisplayName: Kodak Charmera Keychain Digital Camera (Blind Box)
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Kodak Charmera Keychain Digital Camera (Blind Box)' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.Market.ProductTags: Kodak Charmera,Keychain Digital Camera,Charmera,Blind Box,Single Box,Random Toy Camera,Collectible Tech,Mini Digital Camera,Retro Style Camera,Surprise Gift,Gadget Keychain,Fun Photography,Compact Camera,Novelty Item,Mystery Box,Digital Charm,Camera Collector,Miniature Camera,Blind Packaging,Kodak Collectible,Unique Camera,Small Digital Camera,Pocket Camera,Charmera Camera,Digital Keychain,Keychain Camera,Tiny Camera,Kodak Surprise Box,Kodak Retro Camera,Kodak Mini Camera
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Meet the Kodak Charmera, a pocket-sized digital camera that captures charming, lo-fi photos and video with serious retro flair. Inspired by Kodak's iconic 1987 disposable camera, this mini camera boasts a 1.6MP sensor and features seven vibrant colour filters and four creative frames for that instant vintage look. It also includes a keyring accessory for easy attachment to bags or phone charms. Each blind box contains one of seven random mystery designs, delivering a delightful surprise for any photography fan or keen collector.

Please note the Kodak Charmera Keychain Digital Camera is a blind box item. This means each box contains one random camera design from the collection. We cannot accommodate requests for specific styles or guarantee you will receive the secret edition, as all styles are randomly distributed.

Change of Mind

We may allow change of mind returns if your product is in ‘new’ condition. It must be unopened, undamaged, and unused and returned to us within 30 days of the product being delivered to you. A $15 restocking fee which includes the return label is deducted per item returned. Once the item has been received and assessed by the returns team, we will proceed to refund the amount of the product, (excluding the original delivery charges).

Change of mind refunds for clothing, footwear and accessories will only be accepted if items are returned unworn, unused, and in saleable condition with the original tags attached. They must be returned in their original packaging, including sealed boxes, plastic bags, and shoe boxes.

Exclusions to our change of mind policy

We don't allow change of mind returns on the following products:

  • heavy, large and bulky items (e.g. furniture, mattresses, large or heavy appliances);
  • consumables (e.g. cosmetics);
  • health products;
  • jewellery;
  • toppers, underlays, pillows and quilts;
  • intimates (including underwear, swimwear, socks and hosiery).

Products which are on promotion are also ineligible for change of mind returns.

We may also refuse change of mind returns at our discretion where your request does not meet our Fair Use standards. These include where:

  • we believe have made an unreasonable amount of change of mind return requests; or
  • we suspect fraud, misuse or abuse of this policy.

Damaged or faulty items

If your product is damaged, faulty, not as described or has other issues, please contact us and we will assist you in resolving your issues. Our products come with guarantees that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law. You are entitled to a replacement or refund for a major failure and compensation for any other reasonably foreseeable loss or damage. You are also entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced if the goods fail to be of acceptable quality and the failure does not amount to a major failure.

  • Capture charming lo-fi photos with this pocketable 1987-inspired retro Kodak Charmera
  • Built with a 1.6MP sensor that delivers clear 1440 x 1080 stills and smooth 30 fps video
  • Features seven colour filters and four creative frames that add instant vintage style to photos
  • Includes a keyring accessory for quickly attaching to bags, lanyards, phone charms or simply in your pocket
  • This blind box offers 7 random mystery vintage design, including 1 secret edition, perfect for collecting and gifting to friends or loved ones

Detailed Specifications

  • Camera Edition: Random Design (Blind Box)
  • Memory Storage: microSD Card up to 128GB (Not Included)
  • Image Output: 1.6 Megapixels, 1440 x 1080
  • Frame Rate: 30 fps
  • Image Format: JPEG
  • Video Format: AVI
  • Battery: Rechargeable 200mAh
  • Charging Port: USB-C
  • Weight: 30g
  • Product Dimensions: H 24.5 x W 58 x D 20 mm

Package Contents

  • 1 x Random Edition of the Kodak Charmera
  • 1 x Keyring
  • 1 x USB-C Cable
  • 1 x Charmera ID Card
  • 1 x Charmera Leaflet

AdditionalAttributes.Market.ProductTags: 4K Android display,4K interactive display,50-point touch display,boardroom smart TV,classroom smart display,digital whiteboard LG,interactive classroom panel,interactive digital signage,interactive flat panel,LG 4K UHD touch monitor,LG 65 inch business display,LG 65 inch interactive display,LG 65 inch UHD smart display,LG 65TR3DQ-B,LG Android 14 display,LG Android education screen,LG Android touch screen monitor,LG boardroom touch display,LG business display,LG collaborative workspace TV,LG commercial classroom TV,LG commercial IFP,LG commercial touch screen,LG education display,LG education smart TV,LG IFP 65 inch,LG interactive LED display,LG LED interactive screen,LG multi-touch monitor,LG multi-user touch display,LG office collaboration screen,LG smart classroom TV,LG smart IFP 65 inch,LG touch panel monitor,LG touch screen TV,LG UHD touch monitor,meeting room interactive display,office collaboration display,professional interactive display,touch-enabled presentation TV
AdditionalAttributes.description:
The LG 65TR3DQ-B 65" 4K Interactive Touch Display is a premium interactive flat panel (IFP) designed for classrooms, meeting rooms, and business collaboration spaces. Featuring 50-point touch capability and 4K UHD resolution, it delivers a smooth and responsive touch experience for multi-user interaction, presentations, and collaborative learning.

Powered by Android 14 (EDLA), this display allows installation of apps, access to online resources, and integration with third-party teaching or presentation tools. With 400 nits brightness and a 16/7 usage rating, it's built for professional environments that require high visibility and extended daily operation.

This display supports wall mounting or mobile stands, making it versatile for any room setup, and provides multiple connectivity options including HDMI, USB, and LAN for seamless device integration.

Key Features

  • 65-inch 4K UHD (3840 x 2160) interactive touch display
  • 50-point multi-touch for collaborative use
  • 400 nits brightness for clear visibility in bright rooms
  • Android 14 (EDLA) operating system
  • Rated for 16 hours/day (16/7) operation
  • Supports wall mount and mobile stands
  • Multiple connectivity: HDMI, USB, LAN
  • Ideal for classrooms, boardrooms, and collaborative spaces

Technical Specifications

Display

  • Screen Size: 65"
  • Resolution: 3840 x 2160 (4K UHD)
  • Brightness: 400 nits
  • Panel Type: LED
  • Touch: 50-point multi-touch

Operating System

  • Android 14 (EDLA)
  • Supports third-party apps

Connectivity

  • HDMI: 2
  • USB: 2
  • LAN (Ethernet): 1
  • Wi-Fi & Bluetooth supported

Usage

  • Daily Operation: 16/7
  • Mounting: VESA compatible

Delivery usually takes 3-7 business days provided all products are in stock at the time of order.

For orders placed at the end of the week, on weekends, or public holidays (in VIC, NSW, and Nationally) We aim to dispatch on the next business day however it may require an additional 1 business day.

Returns for Change of Mind

If you change your mind about a purchase or realize you bought the wrong items, you can return it for a refund within the first 7 days. However, there's a restocking fee of 15%, with a minimum of $10. Here are the rules:

1.    Return the item within 7 days.

2.    Keep the item in its original packaging, unopened, and with no missing or damaged parts.

3.    Don't return more than 5 of the same item.

4.    The item's value must be under $1,000.

5.    The item can't be used.

 

Other things to know:

  • We'll refund the original payment method.

  • You pay for the return shipping.

  • We won't refund the original shipping or insurance costs.

  • If you don't meet the conditions, we might refuse the return and charge a shipping fee to send back you.

 

DOA Warranty Claims Policy

For DOA (Dead on Arrival) items, please promptly reach out to our Customer Service team, and we will provide immediate assistance to resolve any issues you may encounter. A replacement or refund will be issued after the faulty item has been returned to us. Assessment may apply in some circumstances before a refund or replacement can be issued.

 

Standard Warranty Policy

Items found to be faulty outside of the DOA period will be subject to standard warranty terms. All of our products are supported by a minimum 12 month return to base warranty.  This warranty covers any faults from the manufacturer. Before reaching out to us, please try troubleshooting with the manufacturer for more details about warranty terms.

Please remember:

·         You'll need to cover the cost of returning the item to us.

·         It typically takes 2-4 weeks to process your claim once we receive the faulty item.

·         Depending on the manufacturer's decision, your warranty claim might lead to a repair, replacement with a new or refurbished item, or a refund.

·         When contacting us, please provide your invoice number and the item's serial number.

 

Testing fees and return shipping:

If you return an item that isn't faulty, you might have to pay for testing and the return shipping costs.



Visit this page for more information on how to stay safe online.

AdditionalAttributes.Market.ProductTags: 450 nits brightness,FWD55S30,Google TV apps,Sony 4K HDR TV,Sony 4K home TV,Sony 4K UHD television,Sony 55 inch 4K,Sony 55 inch smart TV,Sony 55 inch TV,Sony 55S30 TV,Sony BRAVIA 4K television,Sony BRAVIA Google TV,Sony Bravia S30,Sony BRAVIA smart TV,Sony Direct LED TV,Sony entertainment TV,Sony Google TV 55,Sony Google TV smart TV,Sony HDR smart TV,Sony HDR television,Sony home entertainment TV,Sony LED smart TV,Sony LED TV 55 inch,Sony living room TV,Sony office display TV,Sony smart display 55 inch,Sony smart entertainment TV,Sony smart platform,Sony streaming TV,Sony TV for streaming,Sony TV with tuner,Sony UHD TV 55 inch,Sony X1 processor TV
AdditionalAttributes.description:
The Sony BRAVIA S30 55" 4K HDR Smart Google TV delivers stunning picture quality and intelligent entertainment powered by Sony's advanced X1 Processor. Designed to enhance colour, clarity, and contrast, it produces lifelike visuals that elevate movies, sports, and everyday viewing.

Featuring 4K Ultra HD resolution with HDR support, the TV displays sharper images and deeper contrast. The Direct LED backlight with 450 nits brightness ensures bright and consistent picture performance across a range of lighting conditions.

Powered by Google TV, users can access popular streaming apps, personalised content recommendations, and voice-enabled controls. With the built-in TV tuner, you can also enjoy free-to-air broadcast channels alongside streaming entertainment.

Its sleek design and versatile connectivity make it ideal for living rooms, offices, or hospitality environments.

Key Features

  • 55-inch 4K Ultra HD (3840 x 2160) display
  • HDR support for enhanced colour and contrast
  • Sony X1 Processor for improved picture processing
  • Google TV smart platform
  • Direct LED backlight with 450 nits brightness
  • Built-in TV tuner
  • Voice control and smart app integration
  • Multiple HDMI and USB connectivity options
  • Technical Specifications

  • Brightness: 450 nits
  • Backlight Type: Direct LED

Smart Platform

  • Google TV

  • USB Ports: 2

TV Features

  • Built-in TV tuner
  • Voice control support
  • Screen mirroring support

AdditionalAttributes.description:
HP EliteBook 8 G1i 14 inch Notebook AI Laptop PC

Model: E8I14(BQ4E3PT)

Equip your high-performing teams with an AI-enhanced PC that offers the power, security, and collaboration tools essential for both office and hybrid work environments. The HP EliteBook 8 G1i 14 inch AI PC efficiently meets the requirements of multitasking teams worldwide.


Overview:

HP Recommends Windows 11 Pro:

Summarize and rewrite content, get relevant recommendations, and stay organized with Microsoft Copilot.


Intel(R) powers PCs enhanced by AI:

Free up time to focus on what matters with the latest Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra processor with an 11 TOPS NPU.


Long battery life:

Get more done in between charges with battery life that is enhanced by AI.


Protected by HP Wolf Security:

HP Wolf Security for Business creates a hardware-enforced, always-on, resilient defense.

* Not all features are available in all editions or versions of Windows. Systems may require upgraded and/or separately purchased hardware, drivers, software or BIOS update to take full advantage of Windows functionality. Windows 11 is automatically updated, which is always enabled. High speed internet and Microsoft account required. ISP fees may apply and additional requirements may apply over time for updates.

* Multicore is designed to improve performance of certain software products. Not all customers or software applications will necessarily benefit from use of this technology. Performance and clock frequency will vary depending on application workload and your hardware and software configurations. Intel's numbering, branding and/or naming is not a measurement of higher performance.

* Features and software that require a NPU may require software purchase, subscription or enablement by a software or platform provider, and third party software may have specific configuration or compatibility requirements. Potential NPU inferencing performance varies by use, configuration, and other factors.

* HP Wolf Security for Business requires Windows 10 or 11 Pro and higher, includes various HP security features and is available on HP Pro, Elite, Workstation, and RPOS products. See product details for included security features.

* May require Windows Update or app download from the Microsoft Store. Microsoft Copilot is NOT available in China, Russia, Belarus, and embargoed regions Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Crimea.

Specifications:

- Battery: HP Long Life 3-cell, 62 Wh Li-ion polymer

- Camera: 5 MP IR AI camera

- Card Reader: SmartCard Reader

- Dimensions: 315.60 mm (W) x 222.00 mm (D) x 11.75 mm (front)/ 15.50 mm (rear)

- Display Resolution: 35.6 cm (14 Inch) diagonal, WUXGA (1920 x 1200), IPS, anti-glare, 300 nits, low power, 62.5% sRGB

- Graphics: Intel Integrated Graphics

- LAN: Intel(R) I219-LM GbE PCIe NIC

- Memory: 16 GB DDR5-5600 MT/s (2 x 8 GB)

- Operating System: Windows 11 Pro

- Ports: 2 Thunderbolt(TM) 4 with USB Type-C(R) 40Gbps signaling rate (USB Power Delivery, DisplayPort(TM) 2.1, HP Sleep and Charge); 1 USB Type-C(R) 10Gbps signaling rate (USB Power Delivery, DisplayPort(TM) 1.4, HP Sleep and Charge); 1 HDMI 2.1; 1 stereo headphone/microphone combo jack; 1 USB Type-A 5Gbps signaling rate (powered)

- Processor: Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 5 225U (up to 4.8 GHz with Intel(R) Turbo Boost Technology, 12 MB L3 cache, 12 cores, 14 threads)

- Product Family: HP

- Product Type: Clamshell Notebook

- Screen Size: 35.6 cm (14 Inch) diagonal, WUXGA (1920 x 1200), IPS, anti-glare, 300 nits, low power, 62.5% sRGB

- Storage Capacity: 512 GB PCIe(R) NVMe(TM) SSD

- Storage Type: 512 GB PCIe(R) NVMe(TM) SSD

- Warranty: HP 3 year Next Business Day Response Onsite

- Warranty Upgrade Options: Refer to HP Carepack Central for options

- Weight: Starting at 1.39 kg

- Wireless & Bluetooth: Intel(R) Wi-Fi 7 BE201 (2x2) and Bluetooth(R) 5.4 wireless card

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Nintendo Switch 2 SW2 Console + Pokemon Legends: Z-A Bundle' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Nintendo Switch 2 Console
Pokémon Legends: Z-A Download Code

The next evolution of the Nintendo Switch system is here!
Bring games to life with a larger 1080p screen - or connect to a TV and play in up to 4K resolution*. Support for HDR, VRR, and frame rates up to 120 fps let you enjoy vivid color, clarity, and smooth gameplay.

Snap the new Joy-Con™ 2 controllers into place with magnetic connectors. Each controller can even be used as a mouse in compatible games.

Experience new, exclusive games like Mario Kart™ World only on Nintendo Switch 2. Plus, you can enjoy compatible games from your Nintendo Switch library**.

Say "hello" to GameChat
Start a chat with friends at any time using the C Button!

Share your game screen while chatting to show what you're up to. And for a more personal touch, connect face-to-face with the Nintendo Switch 2 camera or other compatible USB-C® camera (each sold separately).

Additional games, systems and/or accessories may be required for multiplayer mode. Internet, Nintendo Switch Online membership and Nintendo Account required for online features, including GameChat. Nintendo Switch 2 camera or compatible USB-C® camera required for video features. Not available in all countries. Terms and GameChat requirements apply. support.nintendo.com Games, systems, membership, and some accessories sold separately.

Bigger screen, same thickness
Go big with a 7.9-inch screen that lets you enjoy smooth gameplay anytime, anywhere.

Play with greater detail and clarity thanks to a high-definition LCD display featuring support for HDR, VRR, and up to 120 fps in compatible games.

...step into high-res worlds on your big screen.
Use the included dock to connect the Nintendo Switch 2 system to your TV and unleash even greater detail.

New stand with a freely adjustable viewing angle
Place your Nintendo Switch 2 however you like in tabletop mode using a large, stable stand. With 150 degrees of freedom, you can always find a comfortable viewing angle. Perfect for playing together!

The top of the system now has a USB-C® port, in addition to one on the bottom. Plug in the included AC adapter and play in tabletop mode while the system charges.

Joy-Con 2 controllers connect... in a snap
Meet the new Joy-Con 2 controllers, designed to attach and detach with ease. Strong magnets keep the controllers firmly attached to the system. Simply press the release button on the back to disengage the magnetic lock - and off they come.

Smooth mouse controls with Joy-Con 2
The mouse sensor on the side of each Joy-Con 2 controller lets you turn surfaces like a table or your lap into a mouse pad.

Both Joy-Con 2 controllers can be used for mouse controls at the same time, opening up new ways to play - like using both hands to control two mouse controllers simultaneously.

Only in compatible games.

Includes:

Nintendo Switch 2 console
Joy-Con 2 controllers (L+R)
Joy-Con 2 Grip
Joy-Con 2 Straps
Nintendo Switch 2 Dock
Ultra High-Speed HDMI Cable
Nintendo Switch 2 AC Adapter
USB-C Charging Cable

Estimated Delivery Time Frame: 2-10days

Under the Australian Consumer Law (ACL), our goods come with guarantees that cannot be excluded. If a product experiences a major failure, you are entitled to a replacement or refund. For issues that do not constitute a major failure, you are entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced.

We also offer a change-of-mind returns policy as a courtesy. Items may be returned within three days of receipt, provided they are in their original condition, unopened, and unused. Please note that return shipping costs for change-of-mind returns are the responsibility of the customer. This policy is not a requirement under the ACL and is offered at our discretion.

If a product is faulty, does not match its description, or is unfit for its intended purpose, please contact us as soon as possible. We will assess the issue and provide a remedy in the form of a repair, replacement, or refund, in accordance with your rights under the ACL. Remedies for faulty goods will be determined based on whether the issue constitutes a major or non-major failure, as defined by the ACL.

Nebula Cosmos 4K SE Dolby Vision Smart Projector with Google TV

Nebula Cosmos 4K SE Dolby Vision Smart Projector with Google TV

Create a big-screen theater anywhere-enjoy movies under the stars, in bed, or in the living room.

Create a big-screen theater anywhere-enjoy movies under the stars, in bed, or in the living room.

  • HybridBeam Technology for High Brightness

Nebula Cosmos 4K SE Dolby Vision Smart Projector with Google TV

  • 4K Dolby Vision, Huge 200" Screen
    Enjoy stunning 4K visuals, 40x higher brightness, 50x better contrast, and true-to-life colors with Dolby Vision. Features a 200" max screen size for a truly cinematic experience.
  • HybridBeam Technology for High Brightness
    Our all-new HybridBeam technology combines LED and laser light sources to deliver 1,800 ANSI Lumens of brightness and 1.07 billion rich colors.
  • NebulaMaster(TM) Image Engine
    Experience true-to-Life visuals in every frame enhanced contrast, optimized grayscale and color accuracy, and smoother visuals.
  • IEA 4.0 Intelligent Setup
    Cosmos 4K SE smartly adapts to your space using real-time autofocus and keystone correction, automatic obstacle avoidance and screen fit, wall color adaptation, ambient light adaptation, and more.
  • Google TV with 4K Netflix
    Enjoy a personalized selection of content tailored just for you, and experience Netflix in 4K with Google TV-no external dongles needed.

Returns Policy

At Mobileciti, we want our customers to be completely satisfied with their purchases. We believe that our returns and refunds policy is both honest and straightforward. It's designed to give you complete confidence in purchasing through Mobileciti Online Store.

30 DAY - CHANGE OF MIND POLICY

We want you to be satisfied with every product we sell at Mobileciti. That is why if you change your mind regarding your purchase within the first 30 days of receiving it, let us know and we can organise a return with a refund or exchange, minus any postage costs. For products that had free postage, this will be $10.80.

  • The product must be returned in a brand new, unused condition with full original packaging.
  • If the product's packaging has been opened or damaged, we may decline the return completely or we may charge you a restocking fee of 20% of the product cost or $20.00, whichever is greater.
  • You are responsible for return postage. Please ensure the product is well packaged. For peace of mind with high value products we recommend Registered Post with tracking and insurance coverage, as we may not be able to assist you if the product goes missing in transit.

30 DAY - DEFECTIVE PRODUCT POLICY

If your product has developed a fault within the first 30 days, we offer an expedited exchange process. To help us process your exchange faster please ensure:

  • The product does not have physical or liquid damage
  • The product has its original packaging and accessories
  • Contact us within 30 days of your purchase and provide your purchase details, and a description and photos of the issues you are experiencing

DEAD ON ARRIVAL/DAMAGED IN TRANSIT

If your product is damaged in transit or is dead on arrival, please take a photo of the damage or issue with the product, and contact us immediately (same day).

EXCLUSIONS

Please note our 30 Day - Change of Mind and 30 Day - Defective Product Policy only apply to to products purchased for personal use and excludes any products purchased for resale or business use.

If you purchase more than three phones/tablets/smartwatches in a single transaction and you are purchasing as (or on behalf of) a business, we consider the products to be for business use.

Change of Mind Returns:

Most products come with a 30 day change of mind policy. If at any time within the first 30 days from purchase date you are not completely satisfied with your order, please contact us for return approval. Once received and inspected, we will facilitate an agreed resolution.

Please reach out our customer service to get further information.

Warranty Claims:

For peace of mind, we offer a manufacturer's warranty on all our products.
If you ever have a need to claim against the warranty, please contact us and we'll guide you through the process.
